event: admitted to our department as an emergency
pronounced nuchal and facial swelling on the left side
left-sided microtia with complete absence of meatus acusticus since birth
herpetiform-grouped vesicles around the left ear
formation of bullae in the perioral region
antibiotic treatment with sultamicillin started before submission
antibiotic treatment changed to clindamycin 3 × 800 mg/d
pain management with metamizole sodium 3 × 30 gtt/d
firm infiltrates on left submandibular region
central venous access via subclavian catheter
treatment with acyclovir 1000 mg every 8 hours
antibiosis changed to vancomycin 4 × 500 mg PO
clinical improvement (reduction of vesiculation and edema)
bone marrow biopsy performed after consent
bone marrow analysis showing atypical myelopoiesis
pain in right arm (2 weeks after admission)
